text_template: Support for the show comes from Quo. That kind of rhymes. If your team's communication is messy, missed messages, dropped threads, slow replies, customers can feel it too. Think about the customers. It's one of the easiest ways to lose momentum and that's why today's episode is brought to you by Quo. And in case you wondering it spelled Q Quo is the business communication system built so you never miss a call Quo isn just a phone system though guys it a smart one Their AI can automatically log calls generate summaries and flag next steps so nothing falls through the cracks And it can even qualify leads or respond after hours so your business stays on even when you are off Money is on the line my friends Always say hello with Quo Back to the rhymes You can try Quo for free Plus get 20% off your first six months when you go to Quo.com slash Explained. That's Quo.com slash Explained.
